ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  Mahanagar Telephone Nigam Limited (MTNL) has confirmed the timely funding of its escrow account to cover the 6th semi-annual interest payment for its 7.59% MTNL Bond Series VIIIA (INE153A08154). This action, completed on July 17, 2026, ahead of the July 20, 2026, due date, demonstrates the company's adherence to its debt obligations and SEBI regulations, positively impacting bondholder confidence with no immediate red flags identified.
